name: RemoraHQ - Core
description: RemoraHQ infrastructure shell. Exposes a ping action used by the RemoraHQ UI to verify the plugin channel end-to-end. On server start, verifies the three RemoraHQ Mesh patches (.meshcentral/modificate/patches/) and dispatches a domain-scoped critical Alert if any are missing — protects against silent breakage after a Mesh upgrade. Subsequent RemoraHQ plugins (Alert State, Auditor, Reports, Terminal Bridge) extend this core.
